seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: POWERFUL: The Paul Anthony Ultra Pro 2200w Hair Dryer can be used to style all different types of hair, from short and curly to long and sculptured, with 2 speed settings to choose from to best suit your hair type. Cord length of 1.6m
2 SPEED SETTINGS AND 3 HEAT SETTINGS: This hairdryer delivers max 2200w output with 2 fan speed settings and 3 airflow heat settings.

CONCENTRATOR & DIFFUSER: The removable concentrator nozzle attachment helps to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair. The easily attachable diffuser allows hot hair to be blown at the roots creating volume.

SAFE AND PRACTICAL: This hair dryer is fitted with a special thermal cut-out safety device to protect you from the device over heating. There is also a hanging loop attached, meaning it is easy to store and makes it perfect for travel all round.
QUIET DC MOTOR: This DC motor creates a quieter and lighter hair dryer.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Ultra Pro 2200w Hair Dryer is quiet yet powerful and suits all different hair types. Pick from 2 fan speed setting and 3 airflow heat settings, it can be tailored to you.With a long cord legnth of 1.6 m. Simply plug in to the mains power and set the temperature and heat to your desired settings. Tailor your experience with a concentrated nozzle, helping to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair. With a hanging loop, it is easy to store and perfect for travel. It also has a special thermal cut-out safety device to protect you from the device overheating. This device also has a quiet DC motor operation, yet still has 2200w power Box Includes: 1x Paul Anthony Ultra Pro 2200w HairDryer 1x Hair Diffuser Nozzle 1x Narrow Concentrator Nozzle 1x Instruction Manual Directions 1. Choose a speed and heat setting. 2. Attach the concentrator nozzle or diffuser. 3. Dry and style hair as desired. Safety Warning Device may overheat. Thermal cut-out safety feature included to prevent overheating. See more
